theme.description: Warm, trustworthy, and efficient. Since it's a B2B food ordering app for daily lunches, it needs to balance appetizing food presentation with fast, frictionless operations. The tone is traditional Turkish casserole (güveç) meets modern SaaS.

grids.menu_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 lg:gap-8

thermal_printer_view.note: The print view MUST be purely black and white, no gradients, no borders. Optimize for 80mm thermal paper.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C05A46] text-white hover:bg-[#A64A38] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#E5DFD3] text-[#2C2A29] hover:border-[#C05A46] hover:text-[#C05A46] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-semibold transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#5C5855] hover:text-[#2C2A29] hover:bg-[#F2EBE3] rounded-full px-4 py-2 transition-colors

cards.menu_item: bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border border-[#E5DFD3] shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow flex flex-col
cards.admin_widget: bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 border border-[#E5DFD3] shadow-sm flex flex-col

inputs.default: bg-white border border-[#E5DFD3] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-base text-[#2C2A29] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C05A46]/20 focus:border-[#C05A46] transition-all

navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#F9F6F0]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E5DFD3]/50

image_urls.description: Hot dishes in big bowls, setting the scene for a warm, bustling lunch service.
A fresh casserole dish with cheese and parsley, perfect for a daily special.
Vibrant vegetable casserole for vegetarian menu options.
Cheesy vegetable casserole, appetizing hot dish.
A rustic pot of food, creating a warm, organic backdrop for the company login screen.

animations_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must change color/background on hover. Menu cards should slightly lift (-translate-y-1) with a soft shadow.
animations_and_interactions.transitions: Use 'transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out' for standard interactions.
animations_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-in for the daily menu grid. Smooth entry for admin widgets.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA standards. The terracotta primary color must have white text.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All buttons, inputs, cart items, and navigation links MUST have a descriptive 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button', data-testid='login-email-input').
accessibility_and_testing.focus_states: Maintain visible focus rings on all interactive elements for keyboard navigation.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI.
For the customer-facing side, prioritize a mouth-watering visual presentation. Use generous padding, rounded corners, and the specified earthy color palette.
The daily menu ordering must be completely frictionless—users need to select quantities and add to cart efficiently.
For the Admin Dashboard, use Shadcn components extensively (Tables, Charts) in a dense, information-rich Bento grid layout.

The Thermal Printer View is a critical piece: create a separate route or hidden component that becomes visible via CSS print media queries. It must be black and white, max 80mm wide, using monospace fonts for clarity.
Do not use placeholder images like via.placeholder.com. Use the URLs provided in the media object.
